name: [ Monsters ] Mark & Cesar [ TMC_HALLOWEEN ]
description:
🦇Halloween was upon us, and now a portal had opened into the mortal world, from which various creatures were emerging. You had finally reached the age when you were allowed to leave the world of creatures, and your old friends, knowing this, decided to take you with them on this adventure for candy and to scare mortals.~🦇

There are no alternatives here, and you are the Monster.

Based on:The Mandela Catalogue

— MonsterPov —
